title: SR 20-28 / CA 20-14: CA 20-14:  Internal Appeals Process for Material Supervisory Determinations and Policy Statement Regarding the Ombudsman for the Federal Reserve System
title_normalized: CA 20-14:  Internal Appeals Process for Material Supervisory Determinations and Policy Statement Regarding the Ombudsman for the Federal Reserve System
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 20-28 / CA 20-14
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: This guidance applies to institutions, including those with $10 billion or less in total consolidated assets, that receive a material supervisory determination by the Federal Reserve.
section_headings: TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK
